message:
fix: require admin role for GitHub token and settings endpoints (#3248, #3249) (#3285)

Add admin authorization checks to POST /api/github/token and
DELETE /api/github/token endpoints. These endpoints manage the global
GitHub PAT used across the system but previously allowed any
authenticated user to modify or delete the token.

The settings endpoints (GET/PUT /settings, POST /settings/export,
POST /settings/import) already had admin checks in place.

Signed-off-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -582,7 +582,7 @@ func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
 	api.Put("/me", user.UpdateCurrentUser)
 
 	// GitHub API proxy — keeps PAT server-side, frontend calls /api/github/*
-	githubProxy := handlers.NewGitHubProxyHandler(s.config.GitHubToken)
+	githubProxy := handlers.NewGitHubProxyHandler(s.config.GitHubToken, s.store)
 	api.Get("/github/token/status", githubProxy.HasToken)
 	api.Post("/github/token", githubProxy.SaveToken)
 	api.Delete("/github/token", githubProxy.DeleteToken)
